description.value: Target takes [[/damage 40 type=negative]] damage. Target makes [[/save type=fortitude]] to reduce. If reduced to 0 HP by this weave, target dies and rises as a zombie under your control after 1 minute.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = Fails
- 1 = Half damage (20)
- 2 = Full damage (40)
- 3 = Enhanced damage (48)
system.weavingRoll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery + Space Potential + Space Mastery
